title: Jason Benetti has taken his place among SU's best broadcasting alums
summary: Article profiles Jason Benetti, a Syracuse University broadcasting alumnus, recognizing his achievements among the university's notable sports broadcasting graduates. This is a human interest piece about an SU alumnus's professional accomplishments in sports media, not directly relevant to City of Syracuse municipal operations or the CIO's purview.
